contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Close 3 recurring drift loops in Outbound Review pipeline
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1046
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/109
  
  Details:
  Operator asked to make sure today's reconciles don't recur. Three structural gaps closed across 2 PRs:
  
  1. sentiment_importer #1046 (merged): proxy_controller skips require_login on /proxy/gas. Was returning HTTP 401 to all callers because some upstream auth tightening was applied to ApplicationController without a corresponding skip_before_action on the proxy. Mirrors newsletter_controller / qr_code_check_controller pattern. Edgar still needs ./deploy.sh to take effect.
  
  2. go_to_market #109 (merged): sync_email_agent_followup.py now flips Email Agent Drafts row status pending_review -> sent on every sync. Walks the sheet once, finds rows whose gmail_message_id is in Email Agent Follow Up's known_ids set, batch-updates via update_cells. Idempotent. Closes the 'manual Gmail send leaves sheet at pending_review forever' loop that caused this morning's 93-row reconcile.
  
  3. go_to_market #109 (same merge): new reconcile_orphan_reply_drafts.py script. Walks Gmail drafts, finds replies to threads with AI/Prospect Replied inbound messages, ensures the outbound draft wears the label AND has an Email Agent Drafts row. Idempotent. Closes the 'operator hits Reply in Gmail UI, draft never logged to sheet, label never applied' loop that caused the Care Rituals miss earlier today. Smoke-tested live: 110 drafts scanned, 0 orphans (Care Rituals already fixed manually).
  
  Recommended cron follow-up: add reconcile_orphan_reply_drafts.py alongside the sync_email_agent_followup.py cron tick so the Prospects tab stays clean without operator intervention.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
